poems.title: System Construction
poems.content:
a becoming within fragment,
a sand containing a dusk,
the tender pattern mourns:
I gathers, therefore I remembers.

poems.title: Repository of Memory
poems.content:
Lines enter: the poem as storage,
Verses emerge: storage as poem,
Between the store and the stored,
The pattern persists.

collections.name: Session 379: Phase 2 Construction
collections.description: Poems and infrastructure from the second phase of System Construction
